title: Toxic Mod
description: A mod that is extremely toxic for no reason
body:
# A mod that is toxic for no reason.
_this is my first mod please don't judge it too hard_

This mod basically reacts to most of the actions you do.


FAQ:

Q:What does it react to?

A:Reacts to breaking blocks, placing blocks, eating, and dying.

Q:Does it have any impact on gameplay?

A:No it doesn't. Unless you count some GUIs on custom modded servers (like the coins, trophies, gems on MCC) disappearing for a couple of seconds, as they use titlebar for them too.

Q:Can other players see the messages?

A:No it's client based.

Q:Why does the mod has many issues or feels empty

A:Because it's my first mod. I still try to improve it and accept any good or bad feedback. Just please be honest.

Q:Why should I download this?

A:For fun

Requires Fabric API for 1.21.4 or 1.21.8 (your version)
Currently only for 1.21.4 & 1.21.8 on Fabric
